title: SITE KING PU Palm Work Gloves 12 Pairs – Safety Grip Gloves for Precision Tasks, Construction, Warehouse & Gardening – Breathable, Durable (Red, L)
features: Certified Protection: Conforms to EN 388:2016+A1:2018 (2131X) and EN ISO 21420:2020 safety standards for hand protection, offering excellent abrasion and tear resistance.
Precision & Dexterity: PU palm coating delivers superior grip and tactile sensitivity, making these gloves perfect for intricate tasks that require control and flexibility.
Breathable Comfort: Lightweight seamless liner ensures all-day comfort and ventilation, reducing hand fatigue in extended use.
Multiple Colors & Sizes: Available in five colours: Black, Blue, Grey, Red, and Pink. Sizes from S to 2XL for a tailored fit to any hand.
12 Pairs Individually Packed: Each pair is individually packaged for hygiene and convenience. ideal for personal or workplace distribution.
description: Stay safe and comfortable while tackling tasks with our PU Palm Work Gloves, engineered for maximum performance across a wide range of industries. These lightweight, breathable gloves conform to EN 388:2016+A1:2018 (2131X) and EN ISO 21420:2020 standards, offering dependable protection against abrasions and tears without compromising dexterity. Designed with comfort in mind, the seamless liner and ventilated back ensure long-lasting wear without discomfort. Choose from five stylish colours and a full range of sizes from Small to 2XL, ensuring the perfect fit for every worker. Whether you're in manufacturing, logistics, automotive, or general maintenance, these gloves deliver trusted performance where it matters most. Each pair comes individually packed, perfect for workplaces requiring clean and organised PPE distribution.
